text:
{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"1","subject":"Build Rust backend (Phases 1-3)","description":"Build the complete Rust backend for the Multi-Agent Debate Service. This includes:

**Phase 1: Project init + health check**
- `cargo init` in `/Users/kangnam/projects/auto_company/backend/`
- Set up Cargo.toml with all dependencies (axum 0.8, tokio, tower-http, serde, reqwest, eventsource-stream, futures, chrono, tracing, dotenvy, uuid, anyhow, tokio-stream)
- `main.rs`: Axum server entry point on port 4000 with CORS, tracing
- `config.rs`: Environment variables (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PORT)
- `error.rs`: AppError -> IntoResponse
- `routes/health.rs`: GET /api/health

**Phase 2: LLM client + data models**
- `models/debate.rs`: Debate, DebateConfig, DebateStatus
- `models/agent.rs`: AgentConfig
- `models/message.rs`: DebateMessage
- `models/events.rs`: DebateEvent SSE event types (DebateStarted, TurnStarted, AgentToken, TurnCompleted, RoundCompleted, DebateCompleted, Error)
- `llm/client.rs`: AnthropicClient with reqwest + eventsource-stream for streaming Claude API calls

**Phase 3: Agent runtime + orchestrator + all API routes**
- `bus/mod.rs`: Channel types (AgentToOrchestrator, OrchestratorToAgent)
- `agent/runtime.rs`: AgentRuntime - isolated async task, turn handling, prompt building. Each agent receives history as Vec<DebateMessage>, converts own messages to assistant role, others to user role
- `orchestrator/session.rs`: DebateSession - agent creation, parallel round execution. All agents respond simultaneously per round via tokio::spawn. Orchestrator collects all responses, updates history, moves to next round
- `orchestrator/manager.rs`: SessionManager with HashMap<Uuid, DebateSession> registry
- `routes/debates.rs`: POST /api/debates (create debate), GET /api/debates/:id (get status)
- `routes/stream.rs`: GET /api/debates/:id/stream (SSE streaming with broadcast channel)
- `routes/rounds.rs`: POST /api/debates/:id/rounds (trigger next round)

**Key architecture:**
- Fully parallel debate: each round, orchestrator sends history snapshot to all agents simultaneously
- Agents are isolated tokio::spawn tasks with no shared memory
- SSE pipeline: Agent -> eventsource_stream -> mpsc -> Orchestrator -> broadcast -> Axum SSE -> Client
- Each SSE token includes agent_name so frontend can demux
- In-memory state only (HashMap)

**SSE Event format (JSON):**
```json
{"type":"debate_started","debate_id":"...","topic":"...","agents":[...]}
{"type":"turn_started","agent_name":"...","round":1}
{"type":"agent_token","agent_name":"...","token":"..."}
{"type":"turn_completed","agent_name":"...","round":1,"full_content":"..."}
{"type":"round_completed","round":1}
{"type":"debate_completed","debate_id":"...","total_rounds":3}
{"type":"error","message":"..."}
```

**API endpoints:**
- GET /api/health -> {"status":"ok"}
- POST /api/debates -> accepts DebateConfig JSON, returns Debate with id
- GET /api/debates/:id -> returns Debate state
- GET /api/debates/:id/stream -> SSE stream
- POST /api/debates/:id/rounds -> triggers next round

Verify with `cargo build` at the end.","assignedBy":"backend-dev","timestamp":"2026-03-03T08:13:30.401Z"}
{"type":"shutdown_request","requestId":"shutdown-1772525886352@backend-dev","from":"team-lead","reason":"Great work on the backend! All done, shutting down.","timestamp":"2026-03-03T08:18:06.352Z"}
